notes: Master product catalog with SKU pricing weight supplier and reorder levels. Now includes Furniture category.
Live stock levels per product-location slot. Compare quantity_on_hand vs min_stock to find low-stock alerts.
Customer purchase order pipeline across all lifecycle stages. customer_email is PII — avoid exposing in aggregates.
Line-item detail for every order. Use quantity*unit_price*(1-discount_pct/100) for net revenue per line.
Vendor master with country lead-times ratings and payment terms. rating scale is 1.0 to 5.0.
Physical warehouse bin map. Zone A=Electronics Zone B=Office Zone C=Industrial Zone D=Receiving-Staging.
Warehouse staff roster with roles shifts and pay rates. hourly_rate is sensitive — do not expose individually without authorization.
Outbound carrier shipment records. actual_delivery is None for in-transit shipments. Use shipped_date to estimated_delivery gap for SLA analysis.
